channel.title: Kida Site Hub Data Updates
channel.description: Latest generated data explainers from Kida Site Hub.

item.title: Specialized Asset Spot Prices
item.description: Specialized asset markets are often thin, fragmented, and slow to explain themselves. This tracker turns a small set of repeatable signals into a readable market note so collectors, operators, and analysts can understand whether price movement is being driven by liquidity, inventory, or broad demand pressure.

item.title: Simulation Game Meta Economy
item.description: Simulation game economies can shift quickly when player behavior, crafting costs, event rewards, or rare item demand change at the same time. This tracker explains the health of a game economy in practical terms for players, community builders, and creators who follow market balance.

item.title: Flight Hub Latency Logs
item.description: Flight hub delays are not just departure-board trivia. They affect missed connections, crew timing, gate congestion, baggage flow, and traveler decisions. This tracker turns hub latency signals into a readable operations note for travelers and aviation watchers.
